title: rubus corylifolius subsp. wahlbergii
intro: Rubus corylifolius subsp. wahlbergii, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or Himalayan Strawberry, is a subspecies of the Rubus corylifolius plant, which belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Rubus corylifolius subsp. wahlbergii include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
